verse.name: V1
verse.lines: He promised us that He would be a counselor A Mighty God and the Prince of Peace He promised us that He would be a Father And that He would love us With a love that would not cease.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Well, I tried Him and I found His promises are true He's everything He said that He would be. The finest words I know Could not begin to tell Just what Jesus really means to me.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: For He's more wonderful Than my mind can conceive He's more wonderful Than my heart can believe He goes beyond my highest hopes And fondest dreams.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: He's everything that my soul ever longed for Everything He's promised and so much more More than amazing, More than marvelous More than miraculous could ever be He's more than wonderful, That's what Jesus is to me.

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: I stand amazed when I think that the King of glory Should come to dwell within the heart of man I marvel just to know He really loves me When I think of who He is, and who I am.
